arts.ttl: Liverpool Transfer News: Arne Slot warned over Alexander Isak red flags
arts.sum: The Swede would cost in excess of €100 million in the summer and this hefty price tag, in combination with his injury issues, should make Liverpool think twice about pursuing Isak, argues Anfield Watch expert Sam McGuire . Liverpool can't afford to overlook Alexander Isak's obvious red flags, according to Anfield Watch correspondent Sam McGuire.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Joshua Kimmich has made decision over his future as Arsenal, Man City and Liverpool contacted by his camp
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Arsenal, Manchester City and Liverpool have been contacted by Joshua Kimmich’s camp regarding the decision he has made over...

arts.ttl: Jurgen Klopp reveals his Liverpool return date but legendary former boss admits fears he could 'jinx' the Reds Premier League title win
arts.sum: Klopp has not been back to Merseyside since quitting the club at the end of last season. Klopp's absence has allowed his successor Arne Slot to enjoy a fine debut season without distraction.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news: Reds hold 'genuine interest' in prolific Bundesliga forward
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly have a 'genuine interest' in signing a Bundesliga forward who is attracting significant attention from other Premier League clubs.

arts.ttl: Liverpool fans' claims against UEFA can be heard in English court, judge rules
arts.sum: The legal claims of more than 800 Liverpool fans against European football's governing body UEFA over the chaos of the Paris 2022 Champions League final can be heard in England, a High Court judge has ruled.

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes Real Madrid comparison on Liverpool’s Champions League battle
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot cited the winning mantra of Real Madrid ahead of their key UEFA Champions League return next week. The Reds were forced to battle at the Parc des Princes as Luis Enrique’s PSG dominated the Premier League leaders in Paris. An incredible performance from Alisson Becker rallied Liverpool as they repelled everything […] The post Arne Slot makes Real Madrid comparison on Liverpool’s Champions League battle appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: I know one thing Harvey Elliott needs to do to play more for Liverpool after Arne Slot hint
arts.sum: Former Liverpool and Chelsea midfielder Joe Cole has urged Harvey Elliott to up his level and force his way into Liverpool's Premier League side.

arts.ttl: Premier League GW28 predictions: Man United to lose again at Old Trafford, Liverpool to continue title charge
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes on singer-songwriter Mychelle for a Premier League predictions challenge in gameweek 28 of the 2024-25 season.

arts.ttl: Liverpool boss Arne Slot uses Real Madrid example after ‘lucky’ win over PSG in the Champions League
arts.sum: Liverpool head coach Arne Slot made use of the example set by Real Madrid to justify his team’s victory over Paris Saint-Germain this week. Liverpool, of course, were back in…

arts.ttl: Ex-Arsenal star says Liverpool will crash out to PSG AND Gunners will catch them in title race
arts.sum: Arsenal are running out of time to catch runaway Premier League leaders Liverpool but their former defender Bacary Sagna isn't drawing a line under the season just yet
